events.name: Kochi-Muziris Biennale (6th)

events.name: Whitney Biennial 2026
events.note: 82nd edition of the longest-running survey of American art. 56 artists curated by Marcela Guerrero and Drew Sawyer.

events.name: Venice Art Biennale (61st)

events.name: Manifesta 16
events.note: European nomadic biennial in Essen, Bochum, Gelsenkirchen, and Duisburg. 12 abandoned post-war churches as venues.

events.name: Vancouver Biennale (2025–2027)
events.note: International public art exhibition with outdoor sculptures and installations. Open 24/7 across city parks and plazas.

events.name: Gwangju Biennale (16th)

events.name: Istanbul Biennial (18th – 2nd Leg)
events.note: 2nd leg of 'The Three-Legged Cat' curated by Christine Tohme. Focus on educational programming and public events. IKSV.

events.name: Biennale de Lyon (18th)
events.note: 18th edition — 'Echoes of Tomorrow' curated by Catherine Nichols. 60 artists from 35 countries at macLYON and Les Grandes Locos.

events.name: 36a Bienal de Sao Paulo
events.note: 36a edicao 'Nem todo viandante anda estradas' com curadoria de Bonaventure Soh Bejeng Ndikung. Pavilhao Ciccillo Matarazzo, Parque Ibirapuera. Entrada gratuita. Edicoes itinerantes em Goiania, Rio e Curitiba em 2026.
